from pyspark.sql import functions as F, types as T
import uuid

CASE_OFFICER_PATH = f"{mpesc_base_path}/MPESC-EXTRACT/CaseOfficer.csv"
ENTRA_FOLDER_PATH = f"{mpesc_base_path}/MPESC-TRANSFORM/Entra"

OUT_CASE_OFFICER_MATCH_DEBUG = f"{mpesc_base_path}/MPESC-TRANSFORM/CaseOfficer/match_debug"
OUT_CASE_OFFICER_USERS_FOR_LOAD = f"{mpesc_base_path}/MPESC-TRANSFORM/CaseOfficer/users_for_load"
OUT_CASE_OFFICER_CASE_MAP = f"{mpesc_base_path}/MPESC-TRANSFORM/CaseOfficer/case_officer_case_map"

print("CASE_OFFICER_PATH:", CASE_OFFICER_PATH)
print("ENTRA_FOLDER_PATH:", ENTRA_FOLDER_PATH)

case_officer_raw = (
    spark.read
    .option("header", True)
    .csv(CASE_OFFICER_PATH)
)

print("Rows:", case_officer_raw.count())
print("Columns:", case_officer_raw.columns)

display(case_officer_raw.limit(20))

def nullify_str(col):
    s = F.trim(col.cast("string"))
    return (
        F.when(col.isNull(), None)
         .when(F.lower(s).isin("undefined", "null", "none", ""), None)
         .otherwise(s)
    )

case_officer_clean = (
    case_officer_raw
    .select(
        nullify_str(F.col("CaseReference")).alias("caseReference"),
        nullify_str(F.col("CaseNodeId")).alias("caseNodeId"),
        nullify_str(F.col("caseOfficerId")).alias("caseOfficerId"),
        nullify_str(F.col("FirstName")).alias("firstName"),
        nullify_str(F.col("LastName")).alias("lastName"),
        nullify_str(F.col("caseOfficerEmail")).alias("caseOfficerEmail")
    )
    .withColumn("caseOfficerEmailNorm", F.lower(F.trim(F.col("caseOfficerEmail"))))
    .withColumn(
        "caseOfficerEmailLocal",
        F.when(
            F.col("caseOfficerEmailNorm").contains("@"),
            F.split(F.col("caseOfficerEmailNorm"), "@").getItem(0)
        )
    )
    .withColumn(
        "caseOfficerName",
        F.concat_ws(" ", F.col("firstName"), F.col("lastName"))
    )
)

print("Clean rows:", case_officer_clean.count())
display(case_officer_clean.limit(20))

case_officer_distinct_email = (
    case_officer_clean
    .filter(F.col("caseOfficerEmailNorm").isNotNull())
    .dropDuplicates(["caseOfficerEmailNorm"])
)

print("Distinct case officer emails:", case_officer_distinct_email.count())
display(case_officer_distinct_email.orderBy("caseOfficerEmailNorm").limit(50))

entra_raw = (
    spark.read
    .option("multiline", "true")
    .json(ENTRA_FOLDER_PATH)
)

only_corrupt = (entra_raw.columns == ["_corrupt_record"]) or (set(entra_raw.columns) == {"_corrupt_record"})

if not only_corrupt:
    print("Parsed Entra JSON. Columns:", entra_raw.columns)
else:
    print("JSON parse failed; falling back to text parsing...")

    txt = spark.read.text(ENTRA_FOLDER_PATH)
    blob = txt.agg(F.concat_ws("\n", F.collect_list("value")).alias("blob")).collect()[0]["blob"]

    import re
    chunks = re.findall(r'"value"\s*:\s*\[(.*?)\]\s*(?:,|\})', blob, flags=re.DOTALL)

    if len(chunks) == 0:
        raise Exception('Could not find any "value": [...] arrays in Entra export text.')

    arrays = ["[" + c + "]" for c in chunks]
    rdd = spark.sparkContext.parallelize(arrays)
    entra_raw = spark.read.json(rdd)

    print("Fallback parsed users. Rows:", entra_raw.count())
    print("Columns:", entra_raw.columns)

if "value" in entra_raw.columns:
    entra = entra_raw.select(F.explode("value").alias("u")).select("u.*")
else:
    entra = entra_raw

if "mail" not in entra.columns:
    entra = entra.withColumn("mail", F.lit(None).cast("string"))
if "userPrincipalName" not in entra.columns:
    entra = entra.withColumn("userPrincipalName", F.lit(None).cast("string"))
if "otherMails" not in entra.columns:
    entra = entra.withColumn("otherMails", F.array().cast("array<string>"))

entra_keyed = (
    entra
    .withColumn(
        "entra_email_raw",
        F.lower(F.trim(F.coalesce(
            F.col("mail"),
            F.col("userPrincipalName"),
            F.element_at(F.col("otherMails"), 1)
        )))
    )
    .withColumn(
        "entra_email_local",
        F.when(
            F.col("entra_email_raw").contains("@"),
            F.split(F.col("entra_email_raw"), "@").getItem(0)
        )
    )
    .select(
        F.col("id").alias("idpUserId"),
        "displayName",
        "mail",
        "userPrincipalName",
        "entra_email_raw",
        "entra_email_local"
    )
)

entra_dedup = entra_keyed.dropDuplicates(["entra_email_local"])

print("Entra rows:", entra.count())
print("Entra dedup rows:", entra_dedup.count())
display(entra_dedup.limit(20))

if "value" in entra_raw.columns:
    entra = entra_raw.select(F.explode("value").alias("u")).select("u.*")
else:
    entra = entra_raw

if "mail" not in entra.columns:
    entra = entra.withColumn("mail", F.lit(None).cast("string"))
if "userPrincipalName" not in entra.columns:
    entra = entra.withColumn("userPrincipalName", F.lit(None).cast("string"))
if "otherMails" not in entra.columns:
    entra = entra.withColumn("otherMails", F.array().cast("array<string>"))

entra_keyed = (
    entra
    .withColumn(
        "entra_email_raw",
        F.lower(F.trim(F.coalesce(
            F.col("mail"),
            F.col("userPrincipalName"),
            F.element_at(F.col("otherMails"), 1)
        )))
    )
    .withColumn(
        "entra_email_local",
        F.when(
            F.col("entra_email_raw").contains("@"),
            F.split(F.col("entra_email_raw"), "@").getItem(0)
        )
    )
    .select(
        F.col("id").alias("idpUserId"),
        "displayName",
        "mail",
        "userPrincipalName",
        "entra_email_raw",
        "entra_email_local"
    )
)

entra_dedup = entra_keyed.dropDuplicates(["entra_email_local"])

print("Entra rows:", entra.count())
print("Entra dedup rows:", entra_dedup.count())
display(entra_dedup.limit(20))

case_officer_matched = (
    case_officer_distinct_email.alias("co")
    .join(
        entra_dedup.alias("e"),
        F.col("co.caseOfficerEmailLocal") == F.col("e.entra_email_local"),
        "left"
    )
    .select(
        F.col("co.caseOfficerId"),
        F.col("co.firstName"),
        F.col("co.lastName"),
        F.col("co.caseOfficerEmail").alias("coEmailAddress"),
        F.col("co.caseOfficerEmailNorm").alias("coEmailAddressNorm"),
        F.col("co.caseOfficerEmailLocal"),
        nullify_str(F.col("e.idpUserId")).alias("idpUserId"),
        F.col("e.displayName").alias("entraDisplayName"),
        F.col("e.mail"),
        F.col("e.userPrincipalName")
    )
    .withColumn(
        "caseOfficerName",
        F.concat_ws(" ", F.col("firstName"), F.col("lastName"))
    )
)

print("Matched rows:", case_officer_matched.count())
print("With Entra ID:", case_officer_matched.filter(F.col("idpUserId").isNotNull()).count())
print("Without Entra ID:", case_officer_matched.filter(F.col("idpUserId").isNull()).count())

display(case_officer_matched.orderBy("caseOfficerName").limit(100))

NAMESPACE_UUID = uuid.UUID("6ba7b810-9dad-11d1-80b4-00c04fd430c8")

@F.udf(returnType=T.StringType())
def uuid5_from_legacy(legacy_id):
    if legacy_id is None:
        return None
    return str(uuid.uuid5(NAMESPACE_UUID, str(legacy_id)))

users_for_load = (
    case_officer_matched
    .withColumn("legacyId", F.col("caseOfficerId").cast("string"))
    .withColumn("id", uuid5_from_legacy(F.col("legacyId")))
    .withColumn(
        "idpUserId",
        F.when(
            F.col("idpUserId").isNull(),
            F.concat_ws(" ", F.col("firstName"), F.col("lastName"))
        ).otherwise(F.col("idpUserId"))
    )
    .withColumn(
        "hasEntraId",
        F.when(
            F.col("idpUserId").rlike("^[0-9a-fA-F-]{36}$"),
            F.lit(True)
        ).otherwise(F.lit(False))
    )
    .select(
        "id",
        "idpUserId",
        "legacyId",
        "firstName",
        "lastName",
        F.col("coEmailAddress").alias("emailAddress"),
        "caseOfficerName",
        "hasEntraId"
    )
    .dropDuplicates(["emailAddress"])
)

print("Users for load:", users_for_load.count())
display(users_for_load.orderBy("caseOfficerName").limit(100))

case_officer_case_map = (
    case_officer_clean.alias("c")
    .join(
        users_for_load.select(
            F.col("legacyId").alias("userLegacyId"),
            F.col("id").alias("userId"),
            F.col("idpUserId")
        ).alias("u"),
        F.col("c.caseOfficerId").cast("string") == F.col("u.userLegacyId"),
        "left"
    )
    .select(
        F.col("c.caseReference"),
        F.col("c.caseNodeId"),
        F.col("c.caseOfficerId").cast("string").alias("legacyId"),
        F.col("u.userId"),
        F.col("u.idpUserId"),
        F.col("c.caseOfficerName"),
        F.col("c.caseOfficerEmailNorm").alias("coEmailAddressNorm")
    )
)

print("Case map rows:", case_officer_case_map.count())
display(case_officer_case_map.limit(100))

from pyspark.sql import functions as F, types as T
import uuid

NAMESPACE_UUID = uuid.UUID("6ba7b810-9dad-11d1-80b4-00c04fd430c8")

@F.udf(returnType=T.StringType())
def uuid5_from_legacy(legacy_id):
    if legacy_id is None:
        return None
    return str(uuid.uuid5(NAMESPACE_UUID, str(legacy_id)))

def nullify_str(col):
    s = F.trim(col.cast("string"))
    return (
        F.when(col.isNull(), None)
         .when(F.lower(s).isin("undefined", "null", "none", ""), None)
         .otherwise(s)
    )

users_for_load = (
    case_officer_matched
    .select(
        F.col("caseOfficerId").cast("string").alias("legacyId"),
        nullify_str(F.col("firstName")).alias("firstName"),
        nullify_str(F.col("lastName")).alias("lastName"),
        nullify_str(F.col("coEmailAddress")).alias("emailAddress"),
        nullify_str(F.col("caseOfficerName")).alias("caseOfficerName"),
        nullify_str(F.col("idpUserId")).alias("idpUserId")
    )
    .filter(F.col("legacyId").isNotNull())
    .withColumn("id", uuid5_from_legacy(F.col("legacyId")))
    .withColumn(
        "caseOfficerName",
        F.when(
            F.col("caseOfficerName").isNull(),
            F.concat_ws(" ", F.col("firstName"), F.col("lastName"))
        ).otherwise(F.col("caseOfficerName"))
    )
    .withColumn(
        "hasEntraId",
        F.when(F.col("idpUserId").isNotNull(), F.lit(True)).otherwise(F.lit(False))
    )
    .dropDuplicates(["emailAddress"])
    .select(
        "id",
        "idpUserId",
        "legacyId",
        "firstName",
        "lastName",
        "emailAddress",
        "caseOfficerName",
        "hasEntraId"
    )

unknown_user_df = spark.createDataFrame(
    [
        (
            "00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000",
            None,
            "UNKNOWN",
            "Unknown",
            "User",
            "unknown.user@pins.local",
            "Unknown User",
            False
        )
    ],
    users_for_load.schema
)

users_for_load = users_for_load.unionByName(unknown_user_df)

(
    case_officer_matched
    .coalesce(1)
    .write
    .mode("overwrite")
    .option("header", True)
    .csv(OUT_CASE_OFFICER_MATCH_DEBUG)
)

(
    users_for_load
    .coalesce(1)
    .write
    .mode("overwrite")
    .option("header", True)
    .csv(OUT_CASE_OFFICER_USERS_FOR_LOAD)
)

(
    case_officer_case_map
    .coalesce(1)
    .write
    .mode("overwrite")
    .option("header", True)
    .csv(OUT_CASE_OFFICER_CASE_MAP)
)

print("Wrote match debug to:", OUT_CASE_OFFICER_MATCH_DEBUG)
print("Wrote users for load to:", OUT_CASE_OFFICER_USERS_FOR_LOAD)
print("Wrote case officer case map to:", OUT_CASE_OFFICER_CASE_MAP)
